data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding status-driven eligibility checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific criteria related to status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or data that directly address this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for these checks, but without concrete evidence or checks, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the status-driven eligibility checks.
